svg.title: Synalux POS — forms
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for forms. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: 12 operational forms: cash count, void auth, tax-exempt cert, catering BEO, etc. -- DB: pos_forms_templates
Multi-page proposal with deposit, menu, timeline
Daily tip report for payroll/IRS compliance
Current stock list with on-hand count fields
Vendor PO with line items, costs, delivery
Food waste, accidents, near-misses, root cause
Kitchen opening/closing prep tasks by station
Custom forms use Handlebars templates with POS tokens:
